title: leptinella dendyi
intro: Leptinella dendyi, also known as Dyer's Button, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family native to New Zealand. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various health issues, and its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Leptinella dendyi include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and support immune function. Leptinella dendyi can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
